EXPERTISE DOJO

// HOW IT WORKS

Expertise grows by playing, not spending coins.

⚔ SWORD — land sword hits in battle
🪓 AXE — land axe hits in battle
◎ BOW — fire arrows at enemies
✦ STAFF — cast AoE magic blasts
▣ IRON SKIN — take damage from enemies
◈ GHOST STEP — run during combat
💨 VOID BLINK — activate Shadow Dash

Every level gives a permanent stacking bonus. No cap.

// LEVEL SPEED

Lv 1–10   Fast — a few waves.
Lv 10–50  Moderate — consistent play.
Lv 50+    Slow — long-term investment.

Higher levels require exponentially more actions, but every level still increases your bonus.

// ACHIEVEMENTS
// PRESTIGE
HOW TO PLAY
🌑
THE VOID WALL
A purple wall advances from the left at all times. It never stops. If it reaches you, you die instantly. Keep moving right — every second you stand still costs ground you can never recover.
💡 The wall speeds up with each wave. In later waves it will cross the arena in seconds.
💨
DASH — SHIFT / DASH BUTTON
Dash snaps you forward instantly through enemies. At rank 1 it's pure movement. Upgrade it in the Forge and it starts dealing damage and triggering a shockwave on hit.
💡 Dash is invincible frames. Use it to escape kill zones, not just to move faster.
⚔
ATTACKING & COMBO
Press F / Z or tap the attack button to strike. Chain kills quickly to build a combo multiplier — higher combo means more coins per kill. The combo resets if you go too long between kills.
💡 At combo ×10 your abilities recharge 20% faster. At ×30 enemies slow down around you.
💚
HEALTH ORBS
Green orbs drop from enemies when you kill them. Walk over them to restore HP. Some augments make orbs drop more frequently or heal more per orb. They are your primary source of healing mid-wave.
💡 You cannot stop to pick orbs up safely — collect them while fighting.
◈
COINS & THE FORGE
Killing enemies earns Gloom coins. Spend them in the Forge to permanently upgrade stats (Vitality, Strength, Speed, Defense) and unlock abilities (Dash, Shield, Drain, Rage). Upgrades persist across all runs.
💡 Vitality and Strength give the most immediate power in early runs.
🌊
WAVES & BOSSES
Clear all enemies to complete a wave. Every 5th wave spawns a boss — defeat it to advance. Bosses have multiple phases that get more aggressive as HP drops. Wave 100 summons the Architect, the true final boss.
💡 Between waves you can visit the Forge, Gear, and Runes screens before continuing.
✦
AUGMENTS
After certain waves you choose 1 of 3 augments that change how you play for the rest of the run. Augments stack and interact — two augments together can unlock a Synergy that's stronger than both. Legendary augments appear at wave 40+.
💡 Pick augments that work together. A focused build outperforms a random one every time.
⚙
GEAR SLOTS
Equip up to 4 gear items (Weapon, Armor, Accessory, Relic). Rare gear drops from enemies and bosses. Four legendary gear items can drop from specific bosses at 18% chance — Soul Tyrant, Void Colossus, The Plague, and Crimson Revenant each have one.
💡 Unequipped gear sits in inventory. Sell it at the Merchant or equip it from the Gear screen.
🔮
ABILITIES (Q / E / R)
Unlock Life Drain (Q), Void Shield (E), and Gloom Rage (R) in the Forge. Drain pulls HP from nearby enemies. Shield absorbs incoming hits and stores charges for your next attack. Rage doubles damage for 10 seconds.
💡 Each ability has a synergy — e.g. kills during Rage extend its timer. Check Settings → Controls for details.
✦
RUNE TREE
Runes are permanent passive upgrades unlocked with Rune Shards (earned from expertise progression). Unlike Forge upgrades, runes give flat bonuses to specific areas — damage type, crit, coin gain, lifesteal, and more.
💡 Rune Shards come from levelling your expertise in each weapon and defense.
🏆
PRESTIGE
When you die, you can choose to Prestige — resetting your Forge upgrades but gaining a permanent passive ability. Each prestige level (up to 15) unlocks a distinct behaviour, not just a stat bump. Ghost Step, Bloodthirst, and Void Apotheosis change how runs feel entirely.
💡 Your coins, runes, and gear are not lost on prestige — only Forge upgrades reset.
☀
DAILY MINIGAME
One attempt per day. Three rotating types: Void Sprint (outrun a 3× speed wall), Coin Rush (collect all coins in 60s), or Gauntlet (one life, reach checkpoints). Score is graded and added to your records.
💡 The daily seed changes at midnight. Everyone gets the same challenge each day.
⚔
RUN MODIFIERS
Before each run, toggle handicaps on the loadout screen: No Dash, No Shield, Half HP, Elites Only, Wall Surge. Each raises your score multiplier. Stacking modifiers can push your grade from B to S on the same wave count.
💡 Elites Only (×1.5) is the highest single modifier and the most brutal — every enemy has 3.5× HP.
🌍
ZONES
Every 10 waves the arena shifts zone — 13 zones total, each with a unique mechanic. Sunken Forge: kill enemies to collect shards for weapon upgrades. Time Rift: slain enemies leave damaging echoes. Threshold: a second void wall closes from the right. Shattered Wastes: floating platforms collapse and reform — use the height. Domain and Void Sanctum unlock after defeating the Architect.
💡 Zones cycle — you'll see each one multiple times in a long run. The Shattered Wastes and Crimson Keep appear from wave 20+.
💡 Zones cycle — you'll see each one multiple times in a long run.

A / ←Move Left
D / →Move Right
W / ↑ / SpaceJump

F / Z / ClickAttack
1Equip Void Blade
2Equip Gloom Axe

// ABILITIES
ShiftShadow Dash — blink through enemies dealing damage
Synergy: if you hit an enemy, an expanding ring bursts at landing
QLife Drain — drain HP from all nearby enemies
Synergy: heals double during Gloom Rage (Bloodrager)
EVoid Shield — absorb the next hits
Synergy: each absorbed hit stores a charge — next attack gets +40% per charge
RGloom Rage — double damage for 10 seconds
Synergy: each kill during Rage adds 1.5s to the timer
// SYSTEM
P / EscPause / Resume
MMute / Unmute
TabCycle Difficulty
// CONTROLLER — XBOX · PS · SWITCH PRO
IN GAME
Left Stick / D-pad ◀▶ — Move
A / Cross / B — Jump
X / Square / Y — Attack
RT / R2 / ZR — Attack (alt)
B / Circle / A — Shadow Dash
LB / L1 / L — Life Drain
RB / R1 / R — Void Shield
LT / L2 / ZL — Gloom Rage
Y / Triangle / X — Void Gauntlet ★
L3 (stick click) — Cycle Weapon
R3 (stick click) — Open Rune Tree
Start / Options / + — Pause
IN MENUS
D-pad / Left Stick ↕ — Navigate items
A / Cross / B — Confirm / Buy / Equip
B / Circle / A — Back to game
LB / RB — Switch tabs
D-pad ◀▶ on slider — Adjust value
Start / Options / + — Resume game
Connect any Bluetooth controller. A 🎮 icon appears top-right when active.
// ABILITY SYNERGIES
VOID SHOCKWAVE — Dash through at least one enemy, and a shockwave ring explodes at your landing point, dealing bonus damage to everything nearby.
SHIELD CHARGE — Every hit absorbed by Void Shield stores an energy charge. Your next melee strike releases all charges: +40% bonus damage per charge stored.
BLOODRAGER — Use Life Drain while Gloom Rage is active, and the heal is doubled. Works once per activation — time it for the biggest burst.
KILL EXTENSION — Every kill you land while Gloom Rage is running adds 1.5 seconds back to the timer, up to the original duration. Kill fast, rage longer.

FPS Counter
Damage Numbers
Screen Shake
Ambient Particles
// ACCESSIBILITY
Options for photosensitivity and visibility. All take effect immediately.
Reduce Screen Flash Dims full-screen hit/death/boss flashes to 20%
Reduce Glitch Effect Removes flickering glitch strips from the screen
High Contrast Enemies Draws a bright outline ring under every enemy

// BACKUP & RESTORE
Export your full save to a JSON file. Use Import to restore it on any device or browser.
↓ EXPORT
Downloads your save as a gloom-slayer-save.json file.
Includes progress, records, prestige, runes and gear.
↑ IMPORT
Paste exported JSON below or choose a file.
This overwrites your current save.
GLOOM SLAYER
A VOID BEAT-EM-UP
// DEVELOPED BY
🌑
VORDAL
Design, code, art direction & audio.
Built as a single HTML file — no frameworks, no build tools.
// BUILT WITH
HTML5 CANVAS 2D
Game rendering — no WebGL, no engine
WEB AUDIO API
All sound effects — fully synthesised
VANILLA JS
No frameworks, no dependencies
LOCALSTORAGE
Save system — all data stays on-device
// CONTENT
6 Weapons
9 Bosses
18+ Enemy types
12 Zones
38+ Augments
4 Legendary gear
15 Prestige passives
3 Daily modes
// A WORD
Gloom Slayer started as a prototype and became something much larger. Every system in this game was built from scratch — the audio engine, the zone mechanics, the augment stack, the prestige loop. If you reached the Void Sanctum, you found all of it. Thank you for playing.
— Vordal
